patch.value: Schema scaffold tests: unit coverage (package+extension variants) + materialize/run generated node:test smoke

Added package-variant and extension-variant schema scaffold tests in tests/unit/extensions/extension-command.spec.ts (manifest omits activation, item type/field/migration registrations, sample-test assertions, README sections, define* guidance) and schema cases in extension-scaffold-define-guidance.spec.ts. Materialized smoke verified: generated index.test.ts passes 3/3 under node --test against the symlinked SDK, tsc --noEmit exits 0, and pm create <type> + alias + bundled ping + package doctor all succeed in a temp workspace. Full suite 5006 tests, 100/100/100/100 coverage.
